title: Sunflower Expansion
description: The Sunflower Mod introduces the sunflower plant and sunflower seeds to Minecraft. This mod is just the beginning, with plans to expand and add more features in the future.
body:
# **Overview**
The Sunflower Mod for Minecraft introduces the sunflower plant and sunflower seeds as a new addition to the game. This mod not only adds these new elements but also lays the foundation for future expansions, promising more exciting features to come.
## Key Features
Sunflower Plant: The mod adds the sunflower plant, which can be grown and harvested for its seeds.  
Sunflower Seeds: The harvested sunflower seeds can be used for various purposes, such as planting new sunflowers or as a food source.  
Plant Pot: The pot allows the player to plant sunflower seeds in order to grow new plants.
![Sunflower Pot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aabe5ea6fe9e95d1aa7996d1f898ba543bbdcac8.png)  
Drying table: Allows the player to cook sunflower seeds.  
![Drying Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7415d36e906f1c37d6dd05f74916baac0952d5e.png)
Future Expansions: The mod is designed to be expanded upon in the future, with the developers planning to add more content and functionality over time.  
## Potential Future Additions
While the current version of the mod focuses on the sunflower plant and seeds, the developer has hinted at the following potential future additions:
New crops and plants to cultivate
Unique crafting recipes and items using sunflower-related materials
Specialized farming mechanics or tools
